defenses.defense: Cassiopée argues that the card titles and challenge structure of Bastille constitute an original selection and combination reflecting the author's personality, and that Tohu-Bohu reproduces the characteristic elements thereof without authorization — relying on Exhibit 23 (comparative table) and on the case law holding that a selection of materials may be original (Cass. civ. 1, 20 mai 1980, n°78-15.475).
defenses.parade: Argue that: (i) Cassiopée has failed to characterize in what respect the selection or combination of card titles reflects creative choices […] unconstrained by the challenge-game genre […]; (ii) Exhibit 17 demonstrates that the disputed formulations were circulating online prior to any claim by Cassiopée, thereby placing them in the public domain; (iii) Tohu-Bohu features its own distinct visuals, rules, and mechanics (Exhibit 1), precluding any finding of slavish copying; (iv) the court may not supply Cassiopée's failure to characterize originality (TJ Paris, 18/12/2020, Exhibit 12; TGI Paris, 29/09/2016, Exhibit 22).
defenses.piece_parade: Rapport d'expert (ou note technique d'avocat contradictoire) procédant à la comparaison systématique des intitulés de Tempo / Tohu-Bohu avec les occurrences antérieures relevées en ligne (pièce n°17), démontrant que les formulations litigieuses préexistaient ou relèvent du fonds commun — complété par un constat d'huissier horodaté des sources en ligne antérieures.

pieces_adverses.piece: Comparative chart of Tempo / Tohu-Bohu card-title headings (Exhibit 23)
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the methodology: the comparison table juxtaposes generic themes and ideas (which are not protectable) without demonstrating the reproduction of any specific original expression; the similarities are explained by the challenge-game genre […], not by copying.

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshots of Mots du Soir (Exhibit 2) presented as evidence of the original work
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the probative value: a screenshot lacking a certified date or legal deposit is insufficient to establish the priority and originality of the claimed work; Cassiopée must produce time-stamped source files

pieces_adverses.piece: Prior TGI/TJ Paris decisions (Exhibits 10, 11, 12) invoked as precedents favorable to Cassiopée
pieces_adverses.contre: Those decisions concern distinct facts and did not definitively resolve the […] of the originality of the Bastille card titles in the context of Tohu-Bohu; Exhibit 12 (TJ Paris 18/12/2020) is, on the contrary, favorable to Méridian Studios on the burden of proof.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier contend that the presumption under L. 113-1 has been rebutted: the e-mail […] → Méridian Studios does not constitute a valid assignment for failure to comply with L. 131-3 (absence of identification of the rights assigned, duration, and territory), so that Méridian Studios holds no enforceable economic rights and lacks standing to bring a copyright infringement action.
defenses.parade: On the one hand, the presumption under Art. L. 113-1 does not require production of an assignment instrument: it arises solely from acts of public, peaceful, and unequivocal exploitation carried out under the name Méridian Studios (Amazon sales since 2019, trademark filing, bailiff's reports [constats d'huissier]). It is for Cassiopée/Julien Mercier to rebut this presumption by affirmative contrary evidence, not for Méridian Studios to justify a chain of assignment. On the other hand, the e-mail of 09/01/2019 constitutes at minimum a written commencement of proof [commencement de preuve écrite] of the chain of rights, corroborated by subsequent acts of exploitation. Finally, the Paris Tribunal judiciaire 2020 precedent (Exhibit 12) demonstrates that Cassiopée itself failed to establish its own ownership over a comparable game.
defenses.piece_parade: Un acte de cession de droits d'auteur en […] et due forme signé par […] au profit de Méridian Studios, mentionnant expressément les droits cédés sur Bastille (reproduction, représentation, adaptation), l'étendue, la durée et le territoire, conformément à L. 131-3 CPI ; à défaut, une attestation notariée ou un aveu judiciaire de […] reconnaissant Méridian Studios comme seul titulaire.

pieces_adverses.piece: Contract or correspondence […] […] between Cassiopée/Julien Mercier, predating 09/01/2019, relating to Bastille.
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the certified date (absence of registration, postmark, or notarial act) and the scope of the rights allegedly assigned; argue that this document was not produced in a timely manner

pieces_adverses.piece: Affidavit of […] asserting that he/she never validly assigned his/her rights to Méridian Studios.
pieces_adverses.contre: Counter with the e-mail of 09/01/2019 as a contrary extrajudicial admission; raise the personal interest of […] and the lack of probative value of a unilateral affidavit executed after the commencement of the dispute.

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshot or archive demonstrating that Bastille was exploited under a different name or by a different entity prior to 2019
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the authenticity and chain of custody of the screenshot (absence of bailiff's report, uncertified date); establish by Méridian Studios's bailiff's reports that exploitation under its name is prior and continuous

defenses.defense: Cassiopée and/or Julien Mercier deny any connection with Quiz Mania: they contend that Tohu-Bohu is operated by a third-party entity not identified in the proceedings, that the judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 concerns only Carto Royale 4 and not Tohu-Bohu, and that no exhibit formally identifies them as publisher or developer of Tohu-Bohu.
defenses.parade: Produce the certified legal notices of Tohu-Bohu identifying Cassiopée or Julien Mercier as publisher/developer; build a body of converging circumstantial evidence (judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 regarding Julien Mercier's role at Cassiopée + bailiff's report Exhibit 18.6 + any commercial exchanges or public communications by Cassiopée/Julien Mercier concerning Tohu-Bohu); if necessary, seek a pre-trial discovery order (mesure d'instruction in futurum) (art. 145 CPC) to obtain disclosure of the developer-account registration data from the […].
defenses.piece_parade: Constat d'huissier complémentaire certifiant les mentions légales de Tohu-Bohu sur les […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) identifiant Cassiopée ou Julien Mercier comme éditeur/développeur, accompagné d'un extrait Kbis actualisé de Cassiopée et d'une capture certifiée du profil développeur public.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or declaration by Cassiopée denying any connection with Tohu-Bohu
pieces_adverses.contre: Mere unilateral declaration bearing no certified date and unsupported by any external corroboration; insufficient to rebut a body of material circumstantial evidence

pieces_adverses.piece: Kbis extract of Cassiopée showing a corporate purpose […] (excluding digital publishing/mobile applications).
pieces_adverses.contre: The statutory corporate purpose is not determinative of actual business activity; effective operations may extend beyond the stated corporate purpose without being precluded by it

pieces_adverses.piece: Judgment TJ Paris 18/12/2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) invoked to limit the liability of Cassiopée/Julien Mercier to Carto Royale 4 only.
pieces_adverses.contre: That judgment establishes, on the contrary, Camille Lefèvre's role within Cassiopée and her authority to bind the company; it constitutes evidence favorable to attribution of liability, not a […].

defenses.defense: Cassiopée contends that Méridian Studios lacks standing to bring an infringement action for want of a properly executed assignment of the economic rights in Bastille (art. L131-3 CPI), and that even if an assignment existed, Bastille is not entitled to any protection because it reduces to a generic idea for a sentence-based board game, rendered commonplace by the state of the art (opposing Exhibits 3 and 13).
defenses.parade: On standing: produce the duly formalized assignment agreement or demonstrate that Méridian Studios is itself the author of the concrete expression of Bastille (collective work or work made for hire). On originality: rely on Exhibits 3 Ter, 14.1, and 14.2 to demonstrate that the concrete expression of Bastille (card wording, challenge structure, graphic charter) is distinct and original as compared with Bluff & Cie and generic games — turn the 'common current' argument against the opposing party: when Méridian Studios invoked it in the Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios matter, it was to distinguish Bastille from Carto Royale 4, not to deny the originality of Bastille itself.
defenses.piece_parade: Acte de cession de droits d'auteur en […] et forme signé par Raphaël Dumas (auteur originaire ou ayant-droit) au profit de Méridian Studios, mentionnant expressément les droits de reproduction, représentation, adaptation, pour toute durée légale, tout territoire, tout support y compris numérique — à régulariser ou à produire s'il existe déjà.

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 3 – Other games with a concept identical to Bastille (adverse party's .docx document)
pieces_adverses.contre: Uncertified document, bearing no certified date and no verifiable source; the games listed do not reproduce the concrete expression of Bastille but only the generic concept — the idea/expression dichotomy must be raised in opposition

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 13 – CA Paris, Karbone 14 (adverse party's judgment)
pieces_adverses.contre: Non-transposable precedent: the Karbone 14 case concerned a game title and not the expression of cards/challenges; the elements of originality in Bastille (wording, structure, graphic design) are distinct from those at issue in that decision

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 5 – Official letter from Méridian Studios dated 10/05/2021 (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: The 'common current' argument was contextualized to the Bastille/Carto Royale 4 comparison in the 2020 litigation; it does not constitute a general acknowledgment of the absence of originality of Bastille — the reversal of that argument is a fallacy of decontextualization.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre contends that Méridian Studios is itself an infringer of Bastille, of which Cassiopée is the true author/rights holder, so that Méridian Studios cannot assert any copyright in the work to bring an infringement action against Tohu-Bohu — thereby turning the standing argument against the […].
defenses.parade: Copyright protection arises from […] creation and not from registration; Méridian Studios establishes the priority of its exploitation (commission […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Kbis, registered trademark) and the chain of […] of Bastille. The adverse decisions (Exhibits 12 and 14) concern distinct disputes involving other games or other parties and cannot prejudge ownership in the present proceedings. The bailiff's report […] of 10/02/2019 establishes the unauthorized reproduction of elements of Bastille in Tohu-Bohu, independently of the related litigation.
defenses.piece_parade: Constat d'huissier complémentaire ou rapport d'expert judiciaire dressant un tableau comparatif élément par élément ([…], mécaniques, charte graphique, règles) […] Bastille et Tohu-Bohu, accompagné d'un acte de cession de droits d'auteur ou d'un contrat de […] établissant la titularité de Méridian Studios.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 12 — Tribunal judiciaire de Paris, 12/18/2020, Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios (infringement judgment)
pieces_adverses.contre: This judgment concerns a distinct dispute and does not have res judicata effect on the present proceedings; it does not rule on the ownership of copyright in Bastille in the context of the action Méridian Studios v. Cassiopée/Tohu-Bohu

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 14 — Cour d'appel de Paris, 11/10/2020 (recognition of originality of Cassiopée games)
pieces_adverses.contre: This decision concerns other games ([…], CORAIL, CHÂTEAU FANTÔMES) and not Bastille; it cannot be transposed without demonstrating the identity of the original elements asserted.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or agreement establishing that Camille Lefèvre is a co-author or original author of Bastille
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the certain date and authenticity of any unregistered document; counter with Méridian Studios' priority evidence (commission […] 2 dated 07/24/2018, Kbis, trademark).

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier will raise the nullity of the procès-verbal of the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) on the ground of a substantive […]: absence of regular and separate service of the order (Exhibit 11 [adverse party]), and/or unauthorized presence of a representative of Méridian Studios during operations (Exhibit 18 [adverse party], CA Aix-en-Provence 15 septembre 2016), rendering inadmissible all items collected during the seizure.
defenses.parade: Produce the separate service of process of the order with proof of delivery to the party subject to the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure), predating or contemporaneous with the commencement of operations; demonstrate that only the bailiff and the expert designated in the order were present, with no representative of Méridian Studios; verify that the procès-verbal records statements only after infringing elements had been identified. If those conditions are met, decisions [1] and [2] of the Court of […] validate the regularity of the operations.
defenses.piece_parade: Requête rédigée avec soin mentionnant expressément l'expert technique désigné (et lui seul, sans représentant du requérant) ; acte de signification de l'ordonnance établi séparément du PV, avec remise d'une copie certifiée conforme au saisi avant le début des opérations, et […] au PV ; instructions écrites à l'huissier de ne recueillir des déclarations qu'après constatation d'éléments contrefaisants.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 11 (TGI Paris, April 4, 2014): judgment annulling an infringement seizure [saisie-contrefaçon] for lack of a separate service instrument [acte de signification]
pieces_adverses.contre: Non-final first-instance decision predating the Cass. civ. 1re rulings of 2015 ([1]) […] which clarified the applicable rules; to be distinguished if Méridian Studios produces a separate, conforming service of process.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, September 15, 2016): judgment annulling a seizure due to the unauthorized presence of the applicant
pieces_adverses.contre: Inapplicable if the order obtained by Méridian Studios authorizes only the bailiff and the designated expert, with no representative of the applicant — to be neutralized by strict compliance with Antoine Roux 3 of the application and scrupulous adherence to the composition of the team.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or testimony from a Cassiopée employee present during the operations, alleging the presence of a Méridian Studios representative
pieces_adverses.contre: Probative value […] of an affidavit from an interested party; to be countered by the procès-verbal itself and the bailiff's attestation as to the exact composition of the team.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée contends that the exploitation of Tohu-Bohu by Julien Mercier constitutes a new and continuing act of infringement of which it only recently became aware, so that the five-year statute of limitations has not run with respect to that specific exploitation. It also invokes its status as original author as the basis for its standing to sue.
defenses.parade: Argue that (i) the statute of limitations runs from the date of actual knowledge of the facts, not from the date of their cessation — decisions [1] and [2] expressly confirm this; (ii) Cassiopée, an established player in the board-game industry, cannot seriously claim to have been unaware of the existence of Tohu-Bohu if that application was publicly accessible; (iii) as to standing, Méridian Studios benefits from the presumption of ownership arising from its open and notorious exploitation under its own name since 2018 (Exhibits 1, 2, 7), a presumption that Cassiopée must rebut by affirmative proof of its own title.
defenses.piece_parade: Constat d'huissier daté établissant la […] mise en ligne publique de Tohu-Bohu et sa date de connaissance par Cassiopée, […] à la démonstration que Cassiopée était informée de l'exploitation de Bastille dès 2018-2019 (via les pièces n°7, n°6 Bis, n°12).

pieces_adverses.piece: Agreement or document establishing Cassiopée's ownership of the original game predating Bastille
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the certain date [date certaine] and enforceability against third parties; verify whether the assignment actually covers the rights claimed in Bastille

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshot or process-server's report [constat d'huissier] establishing the date on which Cassiopée discovered Tohu-Bohu, for purposes of fixing the starting point of the statute of limitations
pieces_adverses.contre: Counter that the presumed knowledge of a vigilant competitor predates the alleged date, in light of the public availability of the application

pieces_adverses.piece: Judgment of the Tribunal judiciaire de Paris dated December 18, 2020 (Exhibit 12) invoked as proof of Cassiopée's ownership
pieces_adverses.contre: That judgment rules on prior facts and does not definitively resolve ownership of Bastille as exploited by Méridian Studios since 2018; its res judicata effect is […] to the subject matter of the present proceedings.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier contends that the bailiff's reports […] exceed their mandate or contain formal irregularities (collection of spontaneous statements without express judicial authorization, assistance of an unidentified third party), and that the unattested screen captures (Exhibits 3 and 4 Bis) lack a certain date and verifiable authenticity, rendering the evidentiary chain insufficient to establish the material facts of infringement.
defenses.parade: The bailiff's reports […] are regular: they document publicly accessible websites (Bastille, Amazon, YouTube) without collecting unauthorized spontaneous statements, which […] distinguishes them from the situation addressed in Cass. civ. 1, April 2, 2009 (no. 08-10.656). Commission […] 2 of July 24, 2018 and the Kbis constitute independent, dated commercial evidence separate from the bailiff's reports. As for Exhibits 3 and 4 Bis, their probative value is subsidiary: they corroborate the bailiff's reports without constituting their primary foundation. With respect to adverse Exhibit 24 (list of Bastille updates), its authenticity and certain date are contested for lack of a bailiff's report or qualified timestamp.
defenses.piece_parade: Constat d'huissier complémentaire portant sur le Quiz Mania (captures d'écran, fonctionnalités, libellés des cartes reproduites) ; constat rétroactif ou certification numérique (horodatage qualifié eIDAS) de la Pièce n°4 Bis ; dépôt INPI ou enveloppe Soleau pour les éléments créatifs antérieurs à 2018.

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 24 – List of Bastille updates (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Internal document bearing no certified date or qualified timestamp; authenticity is contestable in the absence of a bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) or a qualified electronic signature; does not establish the priority of the elements claimed by Méridian Studios

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 4 – Correspondence […] Julien Mercier and Méridian Studios (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Emails whose certain date has not been established by a qualified third party; content susceptible of contradictory interpretation; does not constitute proof of prior art […] but only of a commercial relationship

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 21 – CA Paris, 6 juillet 2018, n°17-07.613 (adverse party)
pieces_adverses.contre: Precedent from a separate case whose facts are not identical to those of the present matter; the holding depends on the specific circumstances of that case and cannot be mechanically transposed

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier will argue that Bastille lacks any independent originality because its elements ([…] themed, challenges […], illustrated cards) belong to the common stock of 'challenge/party' board games (Carto Royale 4, Bluff & Cie, etc.) and that the combination of these generic elements is insufficient to establish the imprint of an author's personality.
defenses.parade: Emphasize that originality does not require absolute novelty but rather the demonstration of creative […] and arbitrary choices specific to the author in the combination, formulation, and presentation of the elements (CA Paris, Exhibit 14). Submit the analytical memorandum detailing the specific creative choices made in Bastille (formulation of the challenges, architecture of the categories, visual identity) and distinguish them point by point from the competing games cited. Rely on Cass. civ.1, 30 sept. 2015 (n°14-11.944) […] which validates the assessment of the criteria for characterizing originality.
defenses.piece_parade: Note analytique rédigée par ou avec l'auteur/créateur de Bastille, décrivant poste par poste les choix créatifs […] […] (sélection et formulation des défis, architecture des catégories, combinaison inédite des mécaniques, identité visuelle), accompagnée d'un constat d'huissier ou d'un dépôt INPI/IDDN horodaté des éléments protégeables, et d'une attestation de l'auteur identifiant sa contribution personnelle.

pieces_adverses.piece: Catalog or rules of prior board games (Carto Royale 4, Bluff & Cie) featuring similar mechanics
pieces_adverses.contre: Irrelevant: similarity of genre does not destroy the originality of the creative choices specific to Bastille in their particular combination; to be contested by means of the comparative analytical memorandum

pieces_adverses.piece: Exhibit 12 (TJ Paris, 18 déc. 2020, Cassiopée c. Méridian Studios) invoked as an adverse precedent against Méridian Studios on the characterization of originality
pieces_adverses.contre: Decision rendered in a different procedural context and without the analytical memorandum having been submitted; the present proceedings afford the opportunity to remedy that evidentiary gap

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshots or excerpts from third-party games predating Bastille featuring […]/challenges of the same nature
pieces_adverses.contre: Lack of certified date or authenticity; to be contested by bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) and by emphasizing that adoption of a genre does not preclude the originality of the specific combination embodied in Bastille

defenses.defense: Cassiopée argues that the Leboncoin listing (bailiff's report of 02/10/2019) constitutes a distinct act of parasitism (free-riding) — Méridian Studios allegedly sought to misappropriate the goodwill and know-how of Carto Royale 4 by specifically targeting […] predating 2019, which […] goes beyond the mere reproduction of Tohu-Bohu and evidences an independent intent to ride on Cassiopée's coattails.
defenses.parade: The Leboncoin listing predates any litigation and is consistent with a routine market-monitoring or market-research exercise, bearing no connection to any identifiable savings on Cassiopée's investments. Moreover, Cassiopée quantifies no specific investment from which Méridian Studios allegedly profited through that listing: a parasitism claim requires proof of an individualized economic value and of a saving actually realized (Cass. com., 26 juin 2024, n°22-17.647 [3]). Finally, if Cassiopée is unable to identify a distinct act in its pleadings, the cumulation must be declared inadmissible (Cass. com., 18 mars 2026, n°24-17.016 [1]).
defenses.piece_parade: Attestation ou note interne de Méridian Studios expliquant la finalité de l'annonce Leboncoin (ex. étude de marché, veille concurrentielle, achat de jeux d'occasion pour test), accompagnée d'un constat d'huissier ou capture d'écran montrant que l'annonce est antérieure ou sans lien avec l'exploitation commerciale de Bastille — à […] avec une analyse des écritures adverses montrant que Cassiopée ne vise que la similitude des jeux dans ses […] en concurrence déloyale.

pieces_adverses.piece: Bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) of 02/10/2019 concerning the Leboncoin listing 'Carto Royale 4 […] before 2019'
pieces_adverses.contre: The report establishes the existence of the advertisement but not its author or any parasitic purpose; Méridian Studios may demonstrate that it constitutes a competitive-intelligence exercise unconnected to any investment by Cassiopée

pieces_adverses.piece: Message from Cassiopée to its distributor (Exhibit 10) presented as evidence of a distinct act of customer diversion
pieces_adverses.contre: This message originates from Cassiopée itself and does not prove any act by Méridian Studios; it does not establish an autonomous parasitic course of conduct by Méridian Studios distinct from the alleged reproduction

pieces_adverses.piece: Decision TGI Paris, 4 avril 2014 (Exhibit 11) invoked to justify the cumulation of copyright infringement and unfair competition claims
pieces_adverses.contre: This decision concerns a different sector ([…]/lingerie) and clearly identified distinct facts; in the present case Cassiopée does not establish a quantified autonomous act, which […] distinguishes the two situations

defenses.defense: Cassiopée argues that Méridian Studios' exploitation of Bastille through Quiz Mania creates a likelihood of confusion with Carto Royale 4 and causes it direct commercial harm (diversion of customers, loss of goodwill), the causal link flowing mechanically from the established confusion-based wrongdoing.
defenses.parade: The alleged likelihood of confusion is insufficient to presume the causal link: a concrete demonstration of harm suffered by Cassiopée is required (Cass. com. [1]). Yet Cassiopée has submitted no accounting evidence of its own attesting to a decline in its sales or a loss of market share attributable to Méridian Studios. Moreover, the markets are distinct (physical board game vs. Tohu-Bohu mobile application), which […] severs any direct causal link. Finally, the TJ Paris 2020 (adverse Exhibit 12) already adjudicated a dispute […] the […] parties without finding any causally established harm.
defenses.piece_parade: […] de communication forcée (art. 138 CPC) ou injonction de produire les comptes de Cassiopée pour la période concernée, afin de démontrer l'absence de corrélation […] l'activité de Méridian Studios et toute variation défavorable des résultats de Cassiopée ; à défaut, conclusions récapitulatives soulignant l'absence de toute pièce comptable adverse établissant le préjudice et son lien causal.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation […] regarding variations in Bastille sales 2020/2021 (Amazon/[…])
pieces_adverses.contre: This exhibit documents Méridian Studios' own sales figures, not any loss suffered by Cassiopée — it is irrelevant to establishing Cassiopée's harm and the causal link thereto

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshots of Quiz Mania and the Amazon Bastille product page (Exhibit 6 Bis)
pieces_adverses.contre: These exhibits establish the existence of exploitation but do not demonstrate a diverted customer flow to the detriment of Cassiopée, nor a quantified economic loss.

pieces_adverses.piece: Judgment, TJ Paris, 18 December 2020, Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios (Exhibit 12)
pieces_adverses.contre: That prior judgment did not find any causally established harm to Cassiopée; invoking it as evidence of an ongoing competitive context does not substitute for the absence of a quantified demonstration of the causal nexus in the present proceedings.

defenses.defense: Julien Mercier will contest the existence of certain harm and a causal link: Tohu-Bohu is a free/freemium mobile application targeting a different audience from the physical board game Bastille, the markets are not substitutable, and the decline in Bastille sales is explained by exogenous factors (COVID, saturation of the party-game market, competition from Carto Royale 4/Bluff & Cie). He will invoke the absence of any serious quantification and the insufficiency of the accounting attestation.
defenses.parade: (a) The presumption of non-economic (moral) harm is established upon the characterization of the acts of unfair competition, without any need to demonstrate a decline in sales (adverse Exhibit 25 itself); (b) the harm consisting in undue savings on investment is autonomous from commercial harm: it corresponds to the expenditures incurred by Méridian Studios that Julien Mercier avoided, irrespective of any market substitutability; (c) Cass. com. of 29 November 1976 [1] holds that trial judges […] who impose liability for unfair competition establish, without reversing the burden of proof, the existence of the causal link […] between the wrongdoing and the harm, once the acts of unfair competition have been characterized; (d) Cass. com. of 15 January 2020 [2] reverses the denial of damages based on the absence of proof of actual harm where the unlawful practices have been established.
defenses.piece_parade: (1) Extraction et production régulière du fichier 'Manque A Gagner Méridian Studios.xlsx' avec certification par l'expert-comptable […] ; (2) constat d'huissier ou capture certifiée des données de téléchargement/notation de Tohu-Bohu sur les […] (Carto Royale 2/[…] Play) avec corrélation temporelle aux baisses de ventes Bastille ; (3) […] de communication forcée des données d'exploitation de Tohu-Bohu (revenus publicitaires, nombre d'utilisateurs actifs) par voie de mesure d'instruction (art. 145 CPC).

pieces_adverses.piece: Tohu-Bohu download data showing a marginal audience or a distinct user base (young users/mobile vs. adults/physical board game)
pieces_adverses.contre: Irrelevant: the harm consisting in undue savings on investment is independent of the size of the opposing party's audience; substitutability is not required to establish parasitism (unfair competition by free-riding)

pieces_adverses.piece: Bastille sales figures predating Tohu-Bohu showing a pre-existing or COVID-related downward trend
pieces_adverses.contre: Contest through the temporal correlation […] the launch of Tohu-Bohu and the acceleration of the decline; the non-economic harm and the harm from undue savings subsist independently of the commercial trend

pieces_adverses.piece: Affidavit or quotation demonstrating that Julien Mercier developed Tohu-Bohu independently (his own development costs)
pieces_adverses.contre: Unavailing: parasitism (free-riding) does not require slavish copying but rather the exploitation of another party's work and investments; the interface development costs do not offset the savings realized on the content.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée argues that the concept of a […] game belongs to the public domain, that the elements reproduced by Tohu-Bohu are commonplace and shared by numerous games of the same type, and that Méridian Studios does not establish specific, individualized investments distinct from the mere exploitation of a generic concept (letter of 5 Oct. 2021, adverse Exhibit 5).
defenses.parade: Counter that the parasitism (free-riding) claim does not concern the generic concept but rather the distinctive combination (name, graphic charter, specific mechanics, […] database) in which Méridian Studios has invested in a documented and quantified manner since 2018; the systematic reproduction of these elements by Tohu-Bohu evidences deliberate misappropriation, irrespective of the commonplace nature of the genre. Note that the TJ Paris itself dismissed Cassiopée's claims by […] its own unfair practices (adverse Exhibit 12).
defenses.piece_parade: Attestation d'expert-comptable détaillant les investissements annuels (R&D, fabrication, marketing, […]) et les revenus générés par Bastille depuis 2018, complétée par les factures […] 2 et les relevés de ventes Amazon/[…] — l'attestation de Camille Lefèvre 3 sur les variations de ventes 2020/2021 constitue un début de preuve à compléter par un rapport chiffré exhaustif.

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshots of earlier games embodying the same concept (Trivial Pursuit, Time's Up, etc.) to demonstrate the commonplace nature of the genre
pieces_adverses.contre: Non-pertinence : le parasitisme porte sur la combinaison distinctive de Bastille, non sur le genre ; l'antériorité de jeux tiers ne neutralise pas la captation des investissements spécifiques de Méridian Studios

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation ou déclaration de Julien Mercier sur le développement autonome de Tohu-Bohu et ses propres investissements
pieces_adverses.contre: Lack of certain date and unilateral character; to be counterbalanced by the bailiff's report (constat d'huissier) of 02/10/2019 and the transfer […] → Méridian Studios of 01/09/2019 establishing Méridian Studios' priority

pieces_adverses.piece: Jugement TJ Paris du 18 déc. 2020 (Pièce n°12 adverse) invoqué pour relativiser la position de Méridian Studios
pieces_adverses.contre: That judgment specifically dismissed Cassiopée's claims by […] its own anticompetitive practices; it cannot be turned against Méridian Studios without truncating its operative part (dispositif)

defenses.defense: Cassiopée contends that the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 and the letter of October 5, 2021 constitute sufficient notice […], and that the termination is justified by Camille Lefèvre's intellectual property rights in Bastille being infringed, which […] eliminates any obligation to provide notice […] or renders the 'established' relationship within the meaning of Art. L. 442-1, II entirely moot.
defenses.parade: Settled case law (Cass. com., 2 déc. 2008, n°08-10.731 [3]) holds that the […] must be assessed taking into account the duration of the relationship and the degree of economic dependence, and that the invocation of an agreement or a third-party right does not excuse the obligation to provide reasonable notice […]. Méridian Studios will demonstrate: (i) that the commercial relationship surrounding Bastille was established and continuous since at least 2018; (ii) that the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 does not constitute written notice within the meaning of art. L. 442-1, II but rather a threat of termination […]; (iii) that Cassiopée's challenge to intellectual property ownership cannot, standing alone, justify termination without notice […], given that Méridian Studios's ownership of the rights in Bastille is established (trademark no. 4449595, Kbis, Purchase Order […] 2, 2018).
defenses.piece_parade: Production d'un tableau récapitulatif des échanges commerciaux bilatéraux (factures, bons de commande, relevés de compte Méridian Studios / Cassiopée) sur toute la durée de la relation, accompagné d'un constat d'huissier établissant la date effective de cessation des relations et l'absence de tout […] écrit antérieur aux courriers de septembre-octobre 2021.

pieces_adverses.piece: Letter of September 13, 2021 presented as written notice […]
pieces_adverses.contre: This letter is a mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) grounded in a dispute over rights, not a notice of termination within the meaning of Art. L. 442-1, II; it specifies neither any notice period […] nor any end date for the relationship

pieces_adverses.piece: Éléments de preuve de la titularité de Camille Lefèvre sur Bastille (contrat de cession, attestations)
pieces_adverses.contre: The intellectual property dispute is the subject matter of the principal claim; absent a final judicial determination, it cannot justify an abrupt termination […] without notice

pieces_adverses.piece: Relevés de commandes ou factures démontrant l'irrégularité ou la brièveté de la relation commerciale
pieces_adverses.contre: Purchase Order […] 2 dated July 24, 2018 and the documented Amazon sales (Exhibit 6 Bis) establish a continuous relationship since at least 2018, contradicting any allegation of irregularity.

defenses.defense: Cassiopée/Camille Lefèvre will contest the very existence of an 'established commercial relationship' within the meaning of L. 442-6 with Méridian Studios, arguing that the relationship […] between the parties was one of copyright/intellectual property litigation rather than a continuous commercial relationship generating a characterized economic dependency; it will deny any […] to give in the absence of a framework agreement or documented regular commercial flow.
defenses.parade: Counter with decisions [1] and [4]: the sufficient […] is assessed in concreto taking into account not only the duration but also the state of economic dependency, which constitutes an autonomous aggravating circumstance extending the required notice period. Submit the attestation […] demonstrating the post-termination decline in Bastille sales as evidence of the dependency. Note that the cease-and-desist letter (mise en demeure) of 13/09/2021 and the letter of 05/10/2021 evidence a sudden termination without adequate […] notice. Emphasize that an established commercial relationship does not require a formal framework agreement: the regularity and continuity of commercial dealings are sufficient.
defenses.piece_parade: Relevé de compte ou tableau récapitulatif des commandes/factures Méridian Studios – Cassiopée sur toute la durée de la relation, complété par un état financier certifié par l'expert-comptable […] établissant la part du CA dépendant de Cassiopée et la chute post-rupture.

pieces_adverses.piece: Absence of a framework agreement or formalized commercial agreement […] Méridian Studios and Cassiopée
pieces_adverses.contre: La relation commerciale établie au sens de L. 442-6 ne requiert pas de contrat écrit : la régularité des flux suffit ; les factures et commandes produites suppléent l'absence de contrat-cadre

pieces_adverses.piece: Pièce n°31 (Cass. com. 12 juin 2012, 10-20.540) invoquée pour prescrire ou irrecevabiliser l'action
pieces_adverses.contre: Cet arrêt porte sur l'abus de procédure et l'intervention forcée d'un tiers, sans rapport avec la rupture brutale de relations commerciales ; son invocation est hors sujet et ne peut fonder une fin de non-recevoir sur L. 442-6

pieces_adverses.piece: Pièce n°18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, 15 sept. 2016) sur la prescription de l'action en concurrence déloyale
pieces_adverses.contre: L'action en rupture brutale (L. 442-6) est autonome de l'action en concurrence déloyale et soumise à sa propre prescription quinquennale courant à compter de la rupture (13/09/2021) ; la prescription n'est pas acquise

defenses.defense: Cassiopée argues that there is no 'established commercial relationship' within the meaning of L. 442-1 II because Méridian Studios is merely an operator without title, the relationship being in reality a dispute over ownership of the rights in Bastille rather than a stable and reciprocal commercial collaboration; the judicial decisions (TJ Paris 18/12/2020, CA Paris 25/01/2022) would moreover have ruled in Cassiopée's favor on the rights, which […] deprives the purported 'relationship' of any legitimate contractual or commercial basis.
defenses.parade: The existence of a dispute over ownership of the rights does not preclude characterization as an established commercial relationship where the parties have in fact durably collaborated in the commercial exploitation of the game (email of 3/11/2018, orders […] 2, Amazon presence). The case law [2] (Cass. com. 08-21.681) requires an effective search for stability but does not condition the characterization on the absence of any dispute […] between the parties. Furthermore, the tortious nature of liability for abrupt termination (confirmed by [4], Cass. com. 10-11.885) is independent of the validity of the underlying legal title: it is the economic reality of the relationship […] that prevails.
defenses.piece_parade: Production d'un relevé de correspondances commerciales […] […] Méridian Studios et Cassiopée (emails, courriers, comptes-rendus de […]) couvrant la période 2018-2021, et/ou d'une attestation d'expert-comptable (Camille Lefèvre 3, déjà mentionné au dossier) quantifiant les flux financiers ou les volumes d'affaires réalisés en commun sur Bastille.

pieces_adverses.piece: Jugement TJ Paris 18/12/2020 (Pièce n°12) retenant l'absence de droits de Méridian Studios sur Bastille
pieces_adverses.contre: Ce jugement statue sur la titularité des droits d'auteur, non sur la réalité économique de la relation commerciale ; la rupture brutale est une responsabilité délictuelle autonome indépendante du titre juridique (Cass. com. [4])

pieces_adverses.piece: Arrêt CA Paris 25/01/2022 (Pièce n°20) confirmant le jugement en toutes ses dispositions
pieces_adverses.contre: The appellate decision affirms the ruling on the merits of the rights but does not rule on the existence or duration of an established commercial relationship within the meaning of Article L. 442-1 II; the two […] are distinct

pieces_adverses.piece: Absence of any framework agreement or inter-party invoices produced by Cassiopée to demonstrate the non-existence of the business relationship
pieces_adverses.contre: The absence of a written contract does not preclude the existence of an established commercial relationship; case law [2] recognizes tacit relationships provided that stability is demonstrated by the facts
